formula_or_rule: RR interval (seconds) = 60 / heart_rate_bpm. QTc (ms) = QT_interval_ms + 154 * (1 - RR_seconds). Keep QT in ms throughout - do NOT convert QT to seconds; only RR is in seconds. The 154 coefficient already produces a result in ms.

unit_rules.rr_interval: seconds (only the RR term, not QT)
